features.evidence: This happened before installing any software I have to mention that, setup for this particular machine took more than half an hour due to windows update, which never happened to my other blades but they came with win10 anyway, if the loading circle/animation isn’t stuck, you’d better leave it there until everything is settled

This is the 3rd blade laptop I bought since 2021, build quality is very solid, the screen is beautiful, keyboard/trackpad feel great Compact and the OLED screen is impressive, windows hello is a plusInstability resolves after reinstalling windows, as always windows 11 sucksOne of the best thing is that without using the 5070 I can charge the laptop with a 65w charger, and the battery life unexpectedly good when compared to my old laptop MSI Cyborg 14 A13UDX
